vulnerabilities.description: Lack of authorization checks (RBAC) in the endpoints `/api/v1/groups/:id` and `/api/v1/groups/:id/link-telegram`. There are no checks ensuring the requesting user has the appropriate permissions or is the group admin.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement RBAC to check if the user has permission to access or modify the specific group. Verify that the user is the admin of the group before proceeding with sensitive operations.

vulnerabilities.description: Potential lack of input validation for object IDs when interacting with the database, particularly in methods like `getGroup` and `linkTelegram` in the service layer.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that all inputs, especially MongoDB ObjectIDs, are validated before use in database queries to prevent NoSQL injection attacks.
